judgment.summary: High-growth cybersecurity company with strong margins but a high valuation and significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimates by 9.9%; next earnings date is 2026-06-02.
positives: Revenue growth 14.9% YoY, with strong 60.5% earnings growth.
Gross margin 73.5% and operating margin 15.5% indicate efficient operations.
Free cash flow of $2.86B TTM supports business operations.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a high degree of conviction.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 133.33 and forward P/E of 61.98 suggest a very high valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 4.89 indicates substantial leverage.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter are slightly negative (-0.4%).
Current price ($246.66) is above the mean analyst target ($223.63).

news.paragraph: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) received a significant price target increase from Truist ahead of its upcoming Q1 earnings report. This analyst upgrade suggests positive sentiment from at least one major firm heading into the results. Traders should monitor the reaction to this news and consider the implications for implied volatility as the earnings date approaches.

headlines.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Gets Major Price Target Boost from Truist Ahead of Q1 Results
